generated_oml:
instance PositionSensor : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Position of the gantry carriage read from the encoder via the physical crane interface."
    DTDFVocab:producedData PositionTelemetry
]

instance LoadSensor : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Load weight sensor measuring the payload attached to the gantry."
    DTDFVocab:producedData LoadTelemetry
]

instance SwingAngleSensor : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Swing angle sensor measuring the deflection of the crane carriage."
    DTDFVocab:producedData SwingAngleTelemetry
]

instance PositionTelemetry : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom PositionSensor
]

instance LoadTelemetry : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom LoadSensor
]

instance SwingAngleTelemetry : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom SwingAngleSensor
]

instance PositionData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Recorded position values stored in TimescaleDB."
    DTDFVocab:fromData PositionTelemetry
    DTDFVocab:inputTo TimescaleDBEnabler
    DTDFVocab:inputTo KinematicModelExecution
    DTDFVocab:inputTo VisualizationLibraryEnabler
]

instance LoadData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Recorded load weight values stored in TimescaleDB."
    DTDFVocab:fromData LoadTelemetry
    DTDFVocab:inputTo TimescaleDBEnabler
    DTDFVocab:inputTo KinematicModelExecution
    DTDFVocab:inputTo VisualizationLibraryEnabler
]

instance SwingAngleData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Recorded swing angle values stored in TimescaleDB."
    DTDFVocab:fromData SwingAngleTelemetry
    DTDFVocab:inputTo TimescaleDBEnabler
    DTDFVocab:inputTo KinematicModelExecution
    DTDFVocab:inputTo VisualizationLibraryEnabler
]

instance TimescaleDBEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "TimescaleDB database instance used for time‑series storage of telemetry data."
    DTDFVocab:enables MonitoringService
]

instance VisualizationLibraryEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Open‑source 3D rendering and plotting libraries for displaying crane state."
    DTDFVocab:enables VisualizationService
]

instance KinematicModelExecution : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Executes the open‑source kinematic model of the Cartesian gantry crane."
    DTDFVocab:enables ValidationService
    DTDFVocab:enables OptimizationService
]

instance ControlCommandTransmission : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Interface that sends motion commands to the physical crane controller over serial/Ethernet."
    DTDFVocab:enables OptimizationService
]

instance KinematicModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "Open-source kinematic library representing the Cartesian motion of the lab‑scale gantry crane."
    DTDFVocab:inputTo KinematicModelExecution
]

instance MonitoringService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Continuously logs crane state into TimescaleDB for historical analysis."
    DTDFVocab:provides PositionHistoryInsight
    DTDFVocab:provides LoadHistoryInsight
    DTDFVocab:provides SwingAngleHistoryInsight
]

instance ValidationService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Compares live telemetry against kinematic model predictions to detect drift or deviations."
    DTDFVocab:provides ModelDeviationInsight
]

instance OptimizationService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Computes optimal trajectories using the kinematic model and sends motion commands to the controller."
    DTDFVocab:provides OptimalTrajectoryInsight
    DTDFVocab:provides SendMotionCommandAction
]

instance FaultDetectionService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Detects abnormal behavior by comparing sensor data and model predictions."
    DTDFVocab:provides FaultAlertInsight
]

instance VisualizationService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Real‑time 3D and 2D rendering of crane state, trajectories, and validation metrics."
    DTDFVocab:provides RealTimeVisualizationInsight
]

instance PositionHistoryInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Historical record of crane carriage position over time."
]

instance LoadHistoryInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Historical record of payload load measurements over time."
]

instance SwingAngleHistoryInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Historical record of swing angle measurements over time."
]

instance ModelDeviationInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Detection of deviations between measured states and kinematic model predictions."
]

instance OptimalTrajectoryInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Recommended optimal trajectory for a given target position."
]

instance FaultAlertInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Alert indicating abnormal behavior detected by fault‑detection service."
]

instance RealTimeVisualizationInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Live visual rendering of the crane’s current state and planned trajectory."
]

instance SendMotionCommandAction : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Command to move the gantry crane to a specified target position following an optimized trajectory."
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic true
]

instance LabEnvironment : DTDFVocab:Environment [
    base:desc "Physical environment containing the gantry crane and its supporting components."
]

instance virtual_to_physical_interaction : DTDFVocab:VirtualToPhysical [
    base:desc "Control commands originate from the Control Application, a Python script that constructs motion plans (e.g. a trajectory from the trajectory generator) and sends them to the Physical Crane Interface. The command payload format is not defined in the documentation, but it is communicated to the hardware controller through the same Python interface used for telemetry. Validation, authentication, conflict resolution, and execution confirmation are not described in the provided material."
]

instance dt_constellation : DTDFVocab:Constellation [
    base:desc "The GreenhouseDT exemplar adopts a centralized orchestration model where the twin logic runs inside a virtual machine environment for easy deployment. Sensor readings from the greenhouse are published to an ActiveMQ message broker, which publishes the data asynchronously to the twin services. These services then write time‑series measurements into an InfluxDB database for efficient historical analysis. Coordination between the data ingestion layer, simulation module, and behavioral adaptation controller is achieved through broker topic subscriptions, ensuring that state updates propagate instantly across the twin stack. The overall design leverages containerization within the virtual machine images, simplifying scaling and versioning of the twin components."
]

instance dt_technical_connection : DTDFVocab:TechnicalConnection [
    base:desc "Service inter‑communication relies on an MQTT broker that publishes and subscribes topics for state updates, trajectory commands, and validation results. The broker enables decoupled messaging among the Logging Application, Trajectory Generator Service, Simulation Service, Continuous Validation Service, and the dashboard. The networking environment is a local area network (LAN), with message transport over TCP/IP using MQTT. Bandwidth, latency, reliability, and security provisions (e.g., TLS, authentication) are not detailed in the document."
]

instance dt_hosting_deployment : DTDFVocab:Deployment [
    base:desc "All digital‑twin components are deployed on an on‑premise edge infrastructure. The Python applications (Control, Logging, Trajectory Generator, Simulation, Validation) run locally and share a common TimescaleDB instance. Computational requirements are implied by real‑time trajectory generation and simulation, but explicit CPU/memory or storage quotas are not presented. The architecture supports a single‑node deployment with potential to scale horizontally for additional cranes, although scalability mechanisms are not discussed."
]

instance horizontal_integration : DTDFVocab:HoriIntegration [
    base:desc "Integration with external systems is facilitated through the Microsoft Azure cloud platform, which is employed to funnel sensor data from a Raspberry‑Pi sensor node into the Air Quality Management pipeline. The Azure ecosystem (IoT Hub, Functions, and possibly other services) orchestrates data ingestion, simulation, and prediction tasks. The digital twin itself is represented using AutomationML, a standardized XML‑based plant description format, allowing interoperability with other engineering tools and enterprise systems. External communication with the twin is performed via standard HTTP/REST interfaces and agent protocols (AMQP/JMS for ActiveMQ, HTTP line protocol for InfluxDB), ensuring compatibility with a broad range of enterprise IT infrastructures."
]

instance standardization : DTDFVocab:Standardization [
    base:desc "The Air‑Quality‑Management exemplar adopts AutomationML as the digital twin model representation, aligning with the established plant engineering data‑exchange standard. The overall stack employs Microsoft Azure IoT Hub, which implements and interoperates with industrial IoT protocols such as MQTT, AMQP, and OPC UA, thereby assuring connectivity compliance with common industrial standards. Other standard compliance or certifications (e.g., ISO 23247, ISO 23246, SAE E31) are not mentioned in the provided documents."
]
